days.label: Upper
days.title: Upper Body — Strength Base
days.subtitle: Heavy compounds first. Balanced push/pull. Arms and abs.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.tip: Pause half-second at chest to eliminate momentum. Eyes under bar, slight arch, forearms vertical at bottom. Elbows 45-75°.

exercises.name: Cable Row (Close Grip)
exercises.tip: Pull with elbows, not hands — imagine hands are hooks. Let weight stretch you forward at bottom. Squeeze shoulder blades for a full second at peak.

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.tip: Bench at 80-85°. Lower to ear level minimum every rep — the stretched position at the bottom is where growth stimulus is highest.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Wide Grip)
exercises.tip: Lean back 15-20°. Let shoulders fully elevate at top — the stretch is the most important part for lat growth.

exercises.name: Mid Chest Cable Fly
exercises.tip: Lock elbow angle throughout. Try crossing hands slightly at peak for extra inner chest squeeze.

exercises.name: DB Curl
exercises.tip: Pin elbows to sides. The 3-second lowering drives growth more than adding 10 lbs with sloppy form.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Extension
exercises.tip: Split rope apart at bottom and hold — targets lateral head for arm width. Lock elbows at sides throughout.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.tip: Curl pelvis up (belt buckle to chin). Without the pelvic tilt, hip flexors do 80% of the work.

days.label: Lower
days.title: Lower Body — Strength Base
days.subtitle: Squat and deadlift pattern. Quad/ham balance. Calves and abs.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.tip: Hip crease below knee. Big belly breath, brace core. Knees track over toes. Film from the side to verify depth.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.tip: Hips higher than knees (not a squat). Use high handles now, progress to low handles for more ROM over time.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.tip: Front shin vertical at bottom. Rear foot for balance only. Upright torso = more quad. Slight lean = more glute.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.tip: Full lockout, squeeze quads 1 second every rep. Knees aligned with machine pivot.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.tip: Point toes away (plantarflexion) to reduce calf involvement. Hamstrings respond exceptionally to slow 3-second negatives.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.tip: Drop heels as low as possible, rise as high as possible. Pause both ends. Targets soleus (60% of calf size).

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.tip: Hips locked — don't sit back. Forceful exhale at bottom increases contraction 20-30%.

days.label: Push
days.title: Push — Chest & Arms Emphasis
days.subtitle: Incline-focused upper chest. Low-to-high cable fly. Extra tricep volume.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press (30-45°)
exercises.tip: 30° hits upper chest best. Lower DBs as deep as mobility allows — the stretch is the growth driver. Elbows 45-60°.

exercises.name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
exercises.tip: Pulleys at lowest position. Sweep arms up to chin height. Cables keep constant tension where dumbbells lose it.

exercises.name: Chest Dips
exercises.tip: 15-20° forward lean = chest dip. Add weight once you hit 3×12 bodyweight.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.tip: 5-10° forward lean. Stop at shoulder height. Lead with pinkies. Strict form > heavy weight always.

exercises.name: OH Tricep Extension (Cable)
exercises.tip: Long head only fully stretches overhead — pushdowns alone won't complete tricep development.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown (Straight Bar)
exercises.tip: Straight bar targets lateral + medial heads. Combined with overhead extension = all three heads covered.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.tip: Progress with 2-5 lb ankle weights rather than more reps for ab hypertrophy.

days.label: Pull
days.title: Pull — Back & Arms Emphasis
days.subtitle: Straight-arm pulldown opener. Varied grips. Extra bicep volume.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.tip: Arms nearly straight. Pre-fatigues lats without tiring biceps — so your back fails before arms on every following exercise.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Neutral Grip)
exercises.tip: Neutral grip = lower lat emphasis + more ROM. With Day 1 wide grip = complete lat development.

exercises.name: Cable Row (Wide Angle)
exercises.tip: Pull to upper chest with elbows wide at 90°. Targets rear delts, rhomboids, mid-traps.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
exercises.tip: 30-45° incline bench face down. Eliminates all cheating. Best for mind-muscle connection with back.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.tip: Pull to face, split rope, rotate knuckles to ceiling. The rotation is what makes this special.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.tip: 10° forward lean increases bottom stretch — stretched position under load is a primary growth driver.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.tip: Neutral grip throughout. Brachialis pushes the biceps up when developed — adds arm width.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.tip: 45-60° bench, arms behind torso. Only exercise targeting bicep long head in its stretched position.

days.label: Legs
days.title: Legs — Hypertrophy Focus
days.subtitle: Quad-dominant with RDL. Drop sets on isolations. Leg press for loading.

exercises.name: Front Squat / Hack Squat
exercises.tip: More upright = more quad. Hack squat easier to load heavy for pure hypertrophy. Full depth.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips; bar on legs
exercises.tip: Start from rack. Bar drags thighs. 'Hips back' not 'bar down.' Stop when hamstrings stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.tip: Lower feet = more quad. Higher = more glute. 90° knee bend minimum. Never lock knees.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.tip: Last set: failure → drop 30% → failure again. Drop sets recruit remaining fibers.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.tip: Same drop set protocol. RDLs (stretch) + curls (contraction) = complete hamstring development.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.tip: Straight → toes out 15° → toes in 15° → straight.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.tip: Tuck pelvis BEFORE rolling. If lower back arches, you've gone too far.
